sqlReaderQuery.value:
select artist_id,
artist_name,
genre,
country,
updated_at
from dbo.DimArtist
where updated_at > '@{activity('get last updated').output.firstRow.updated_at}'

text.value: select max(updated_at) as max_date from dbo.DimArtist

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select user_id,
user_name,
country,
subscription_type,
start_date,
end_date,
updated_at
from dbo.DimUser
where updated_at > '@{activity('get last date').output.value[0].updated_at}'

text.value: select max(updated_at) as max_date from dbo.DimUser

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select stream_id,
user_id,
track_id,
date_key,
listen_duration,
device_type,
stream_timestamp
FROM dbo.FactStream
where stream_timestamp > '@{activity('getting last update').output.value[0].Fact_last_update}'

text.value: select max(stream_timestamp) as latest_date from dbo.FactStream

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select date_key,
date,
day,
month,
year,
weekday
from DimDate
where date > '@{activity('get last date').output.value[0].max_date}'

text.value: select max(date) as max_date from dbo.DimDate

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select track_id,
track_name,
artist_id
album_name,
duration_sec,
release_date,
updated_at
 from dbo.DimTrack
 where updated_at > '@{activity('get last updated_at').output.value[0].updated_at}'

text.value: select max(updated_at) as max_updated_at from dbo.DimTrack
